description: Perform a land use change analysis by executing a Union overlay with /home/ga/GIS_Data/landuse_2015.geojson as the input layer and /home/ga/GIS_Data/landuse_2025.geojson as the overlay layer. In the resulting layer, calculate the area of each feature in square kilometers (using $area / 1000000) and store it in a new decimal field named transition_area_sqkm. Export the attribute table containing the land use classes from both years and the calculated area to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/change_matrix.csv.
